journey_type_reason: 本次 sprint 验证的是 harness 开发流程引擎（parsePrdNode git diff 逻辑），属于开发管道自验证

tasks.title: 创建 B37 验证脚本 verify-b37.sh
tasks.scope: 在 sprints/w49-b37-validation/ 创建可执行验证脚本，含 ≥4 条断言：(1) git diff 输出含目标路径 (2) sprint-prd.md 存在 (3) sprint-contract.md 存在 (4) Brain 日志无 ENOENT（动态查找容器名）；脚本运行 exit 0 输出 'B37 验证全部通过'
dod: [ARTIFACT] sprints/w49-b37-validation/verify-b37.sh 存在且含 ≥4 条 ✅ PASS 标记
[BEHAVIOR] git diff --name-only origin/main HEAD -- sprints/ 输出含 sprints/w49-b37-validation/ 路径
[BEHAVIOR] bash verify-b37.sh exit 0 且输出含 'B37 验证全部通过'
[BEHAVIOR] bash verify-b37.sh 输出 ≥4 条 ✅ PASS 断言
[BEHAVIOR] Brain Docker 日志（动态查找容器名）无 ENOENT 关联 w49-b37-validation
